  "complexity_notes": "Well-structured async FastAPI application implementing full CRUD for projects with JWT authentication, WebSocket real-time broadcasting, pagination/filtering, and background tasks. Uses modern Python 3.11+ features (StrEnum, UTC, union type syntax). Notable issues: JSONResponse is imported late (mid-file after usage in global_exception_handler, causing potential NameError at handler definition time), hardcoded secrets (JWT_SECRET, DATABASE_URL) should be environment-driven, CORS allows all origins with credentials (insecure combination), broad 'except Exception' clauses in ConnectionManager.broadcast and websocket_project silently swallow errors, and 'status' query param in list_projects shadows the imported fastapi.status module within that function scope. Overall moderate complexity with clean separation of concerns (config, models, schemas, helpers, endpoints)."
